  Fix 0: "Disable unnecessaryPipe for this line"
  Fix 1: "Disable unnecessaryPipe for entire file"
  Fix 2: "Remove the pipe call"

=== Quick Fix Application Results ===

=== [D1] Fix 0: "Disable unnecessaryPipe for this line" ===
skipped by default

=== [D1] Fix 1: "Disable unnecessaryPipe for entire file" ===
skipped by default

=== [D1] Fix 2: "Remove the pipe call" ===

--- file:///.src/emptyArgs.ts ---
import * as Effect from "effect/Effect"
import { pipe } from "effect/Function"

// Pipe with single value (no transformations)
export const result1 =Effect.succeed(1)

// Pipeable with no args
export const result2 = Effect.succeed(1).pipe()


=== [D2] Fix 0: "Disable unnecessaryPipe for this line" ===
skipped by default

=== [D2] Fix 1: "Disable unnecessaryPipe for entire file" ===
skipped by default

=== [D2] Fix 2: "Remove the pipe call" ===

--- file:///.src/emptyArgs.ts ---
import * as Effect from "effect/Effect"
import { pipe } from "effect/Function"

// Pipe with single value (no transformations)
export const result1 = pipe(Effect.succeed(1))

// Pipeable with no args
export const result2 = Effect.succeed(1)
